form.formComment: Won two starts back over 520m at Wentworth Park. Last start he finished 3rd in a Mix 2/3 on February 16 over 365m at Nowra behind Nicko Jack beaten 6 lengths (20.84). Draw likely to suit. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back over 520m at Wentworth Park. Last start he finished 3rd in a Mix 2/3 on February 16 over 365m at Nowra behind Nicko Jack beaten 6 lengths (20.84). Draw likely to suit. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began to yield ground entering the back straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.93) when fifth over 320m at Wagga in a Grade 5. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (18.93) when fifth over 320m at Wagga in a Grade 5. Has a win and three places from four starts from this draw. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Resumes. Closed last prep with a second over 365m at Nowra eight months ago. Drawn well and will take beating with a clean break.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes. Closed last prep with a second over 365m at Nowra eight months ago. Drawn well and will take beating with a clean break.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first corner contacted the heels and fell.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Ballarat to win by 3.5 lengths in 22.27, beating Tasman Hope. Last start finished 5th over 330m at Temora beaten 7 lengths (19.46) behind Roses Ring in a Mix 2/3 on April 1. Prefer in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Royal Bandit over 350m. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Royal Bandit over 350m. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at Dubbo last time when a 1.75 lengths second but did record a hot 18.04 for the 318m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at Dubbo last time when a 1.75 lengths second but did record a hot 18.04 for the 318m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of latest.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 20.37, beating Pay Pay Pay. Last start finished 4th on February 27 over 350m at this track behind Zipping Gryllis beaten 2.75 lengths (20.19) in a Mix 2/3. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 440m. Coming out of a very strong form race. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 6th on March 26 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Pinch Point beaten 6 lengths (18.18) in a Mix 3/4. Well placed and among the chances here.
